Higher speed reduces the window of defeat for Ukrainian air defense systems and...

title: 120 missiles
description: "Banderol" is a budget missile that the enemy will not be able to launch in large quantities - adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov According to him, the production plan for this year is 120 missiles per month, which means that the enemy will be able to launch only 4 such missiles every day. According to his estimates, the plant has not yet reached the planned production rate. "The missile has an OFBCH-150 s 50 kg warhead...
description_en: "Banderol" is a budget missile that the enemy will not be able to launch in large quantities - adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergey "Flash" Beskrestnov According to him, the production plan for this year is 120 missiles per month, which means that the enemy will be able to launch only 4 such missiles every day. According to his estimates, the plant has not yet reached the planned production rate. "The missile has an OFBCH-150 s 50 kg warhead...
description_uk: "Бандероль" - бюджетная ракета, которую враг не сможет запускать в больших количествах, - советник министра обороны Сергей "Флэш" Бескрестнов По его словам, план производства на этот год - 120 ракет в месяц, что означает, что ежедневно противник сможет запускать только 4 таких ракеты. По его оценкам, завод ещё не достиг планового показателя производства. "Ракета имеет боеголовку ОФБЧ-150 с 50 кг...

description: Ukrainian pilots no longer need to be in the immediate vicinity of the front line. More and more Ukrainian units operate remotely in this way, including to protect the lives of soldiers, Zeit writes. This front line, in which almost nothing moves, in some places...

Все больше украинских подразделений действуют таким образом дистанционно, в том числе для защиты жизней солдат, пишет Zeit Благодаря новым разработкам дроны летают на всё большие расстояния, в результате чего растёт kill zone. Эта полоса фронта, в которой почти ничего не движется, в некоторых местах...

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Head of Ukraine’s state-run defense giant steps down. The news follows a major controversy at Ukroboronprom, centered around a deadly explosion at one of its ammunition depots during a Russian attack on the Kyiv suburb of Vyshneve on July 6.
description_en: Head of Ukraine’s state-run defense giant steps down. The news follows a major controversy at Ukroboronprom, centered around a deadly explosion at one of its ammunition depots during a Russian attack on the Kyiv suburb of Vyshneve on July 6.

title: Casualties reported
description: The Russians have lost one more ship: the Ukrainian Navy announced the destruction of the FSB border ship "Izumrud". It is reported that there are dead and wounded among the crew. "Izumrud" participated in the attack on Ukrainian ships in the Kerch Strait in 2018.
description_en: The Russians have lost one more ship: the Ukrainian Navy announced the destruction of the FSB border ship "Izumrud". It is reported that there are dead and wounded among the crew. "Izumrud" participated in the attack on Ukrainian ships in the Kerch Strait in 2018.
description_uk: У россиян минус еще один кораблик: ВМС Украины заявили об уничтожении пограничного корабля ФСБ "Изумруд" По данным ВМС ВСУ, судно уничтожили морским безэкипажным дроном Sargan-3000 возле Новороссийска. Сообщается, что среди экипажа есть погибшие и раненые. "Изумруд" участвовал в нападении на украинские корабли в Керченском проливе в 2018 году.

title: Attack attack
description: The Ukrainian Armed Forces hit two refineries, a patrol ship and four tankers of the Russian shadow fleet - Zelensky. A patrol ship and a shadow fleet tanker were also hit in Gelendzhik. Three more Russian tankers attacked in the Sea of ​​Azov.
description_en: The Ukrainian Armed Forces hit two refineries, a patrol ship and four tankers of the Russian shadow fleet - Zelensky. A patrol ship and a shadow fleet tanker were also hit in Gelendzhik. Three more Russian tankers attacked in the Sea of ​​Azov.
description_uk: ВСУ поразили два НПЗ, патрульный корабль и четыре танкера теневого флота рф, - Зеленский В Башкортостане под удар попал НПЗ в 1300 км от линии фронта, в Краснодарском крае - Афипский НПЗ. Также в Геленджике поражены патрульный корабль и танкер теневого флота. Еще три российских танкера атаковали в Азовском море.

description: During this night, Ukrainian UAVs defeated 11 Katsap ships, - "Magyar" These are tankers, bulk carriers, and a tugboat. In total, over the past 9 days, friendly drones disabled 116 vessels.

title: Donetsk: 7 missiles intercepted

description: Explosions reported in Kyiv amid missile threat. Kyiv Independent journalists on the ground reported explosions in the capital at around 12:15 a.m. local time as Ukraine's Air Force warned of the threat of Russian ballistic missiles heading toward Kyiv.

title: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: «Разом із Першою леді України,...
description: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: "Разом із Першою леді України Оленою Зеленською провели плідну зустріч із генеральним директором ЮНЕСКО Халедом Ель-Енані. Ми обговорили розширення співпраці задля захисту освіти, культури, науки та свободи вираження поглядів в умовах триваючої російської агресії". Міністр висловив вдячність ЮНЕСКО за ініціативи з підтримки та збереження спільної культурної спадщини....

description: UK to participate in EU’s 90 billion euro Ukraine loan. “This agreement will help ensure Ukraine gets the support it needs to defend itself against Russian aggression, while backing British defense companies, supporting skilled jobs and strengthening our national security,” said British Prime Minister Keir Starmer on July 13.
description_en: UK to participate in EU’s 90 billion euro Ukraine loan. “This agreement will help ensure Ukraine gets the support it needs to defend itself against Russian aggression, while backing British defense companies, supporting skilled jobs and strengthening our national security,” said British Prime Minister Keir Starmer on July 13.
